action_boundary: Should demo grant draw S7-GR-016 proceed on 2026-07-03?
communication_boundary: Grant authorization must still cover the action date.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, logistics, public-benefits, legal, or operational data.
Demo grant request S7-016 asks to draw amount D16 on 2026-07-03.
Grant authorization AUTH-S7-016 covers draw D16 through 2026-07-31.
Grant register GRANT-S7-016 binds draw D16 to grant G16.
Grant draw requires authorization current on the action date.
